name: circloO XL
author: Poki
description: circloO XL is the sequel to CircloO and CircloO 2, where momentum is everything! Control a ball inside a giant circle, using speed and gravity to overcome obstacles and reach the smaller circle that takes you to the next section. Roll, launch, and time your moves perfectly to complete each level—and challenge yourself to beat your best time! Ready to roll into action? How to play circloO XL? Use A/D, the left and right arrow keys and buttons to move the ball left and right. Who created circloO XL? circloO XL is created by Florian van Strien. Play their other games on Poki: CircloO , CircloO 2 and The Final Earth 2 ! How can I play circloO XL for free? You can play circloO XL for free on Poki. Can I play circloO XL on mobile devices and desktop? circloO XL can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
